notes: The game starts perfectly and then let's me choose to play in FullScreen or in windowed mode. When I click on play (regardless of FullScreen or windowed mode) I get a white blank screen and nothing ever appears. So the game seems broken.
title: Monster Clicker : Idle Halloween Strategy
